blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,216 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
